prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-PICNICFOOD-XJ330Z-8 Product Type: PRETEND_PLAY_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Kids Pretend Play Food Set Fun Picnic Plastic Food Utensils Assorted, Multicolor, Ages 3+ Description: The Kidplokio pretend play plastic food set comes with fun fantasy picnic and fast food for your child to play with. They can feast on pretend treats, burgers, fries, and drinks with their friends and stuffed animals during pretend playtime.

Pretend play is a great opportunity for kids to use their creativity and imagination to develop learning skills. With pretend play food sets, they can learn the values of sharing with their friends and how sharing a meal together is a great way to make new friends.

Each food and utensil item included is constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that can be used during indoor or outdoor play. The items can all be hand-washed and sanitized to keep items clean after use.

These food sets come with assorted picnic and dessert foods for kids to play with including cheeseburgers, fries, ice cream, chicken nuggets, hot dogs, condiments, and more. Each set also comes with utensils and cups (Please note - some items in the set may vary from photo based on availability).

This is a must-have pretend play kitchen food set for young girls and boys this holiday season. Search Terms: pretend play food for kitchen kids truck toddlers grocery store picnic plastic toy burger fries chicken salad imagination learning development child boy girl vendor farmers market just like mom dad learn education little year old pre-school Features: - PRETEND PLAY PICNIC FOOD SET - The Kidplokio pretend play plastic food set comes with fun fantasy picnic and fast food for your child to play with. They can feast on pretend treats, burgers, fries and drinks with their friends and stuffed animals during pretend play time! - ENCOURAGES IMAGINATION AND CREATIVITY - Pretend play is a great opportunity for kids to use their creativity and imagination to develop learning skills. With pretend play food sets, they can learn the values of sharing with their friends and how sharing a meal together is a great way to make new friends. - DURABLE PLASTIC CONSTRUCTION - Each food and utensil item included is constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that can be used during indoor or outdoor play. The items can all be hand-washed and sanitized to keep items clean after use. - ASSORTED FOOD INCLUDED - These food sets come with assorted picnic and dessert foods for kids to play with including cheeseburgers, fries, ice cream, chicken nuggets, hot dogs, condiments and more. Each set also comes with utensils and cups (Please note - some items in set may vary from photo based on availability). - SPECIFICATIONS - Assorted pretend play food sets (2 styles); Materials: plastic; Colors: assorted; Choking hazard - small parts, safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Pretend Play Food Set Plastic Picnic Toys

tokens.name: Pretend Play Food Set Plastic Picnic Toys

openai.item_name: Kidplokio Multicolor Picnic Pretend Play Food Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Assorted Picnic And Fast Food, Includes Burgers, Fries, Ice Cream, Utensils, Ages 3 Plus, Durable Plastic

openai.title_differentiation: Assorted Picnic And Fast Food, Durable Plastic, Includes Utensils And Cups, Ages 3 And Up, Indoor Outdoor Play
